docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY MONTESINOS, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT DUBON, ALSELMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
